eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 4:01 PM on JUL 3, 2026 Effective until 4:01 PM JUL 4, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Reason : Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/03/2026 3:38 PM
There is a wildfire near Sedona Area. SET Status for YCU-1193. Gather essential supplies. Prepare to evacuate. 
Link to affected zones : https://go.genasys.com/s8t2fd
